news-global-econ.title: 'Where's the Money?': California Librarian Questioned on Missing $650,000 Linked to Dolly Parton Initiative
news-global-econ.description:
California's top librarian is accused of failing to produce $650,000 in missing funds linked to a literacy program country music star Dolly Parton began in 1995.

news-global-econ.title: World Economic Forum faces fresh scrutiny as Epstein ties revive past scandals, criticism
news-global-econ.description: The World Economic Forum faces renewed scrutiny after Epstein links surfaced, adding to years of controversy surrounding Davos, leadership scandals and criticism of the globalist agenda.

news-global-econ.title: Transactional partners: How 200-year distrust shapes Russia’s response to the Iran conflict
news-global-econ.description: From rivalry to military cooperation, the Russia-Iran relationship remains transactional. How Ukraine changed their strategic partnership dynamics.

news-global-econ.title: Newly launched coalition with ‘affordability agenda’ vows to attack guaranteed income programs
news-global-econ.description: New conservative organization argued guaranteed income programs will create fiscal problems and drive inflation as cash assistance programs gain momentum across 15 states.

news-global-soc.title: Bill Maher presses Gov. Josh Shapiro on Iran war, asks if 'you would still do nothing?'
news-global-soc.description: Bill Maher challenges Gov. Josh Shapiro on Iran policy during "Real Time" debate about nuclear weapons and Middle East military involvement.

news-global-soc.title: Stephen Colbert mocked by Variety over 'ego trip' as guests kiss his ring before May exit
news-global-soc.description: Stephen Colbert's "Late Show" final season criticized by Variety correspondent Daniel D'Addario as transforming from resistance to ego trip with celebrity guests flattering the host.

news-global-soc.description: Iran's sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz threaten the global oil supply as President Donald Trump orders strikes on key Iranian island.

news-global-soc.title: Iran using AI to control global narrative as regime can't win on the battlefield, former security chief warns
news-global-soc.description: Former CISA director warns Iran is allegedly using AI to create false narratives about winning against the U.S., urging people to be careful about online content.
